data.title: Minna no Umi
data.synopsis: A little boy reminisces his time at the beach with his grandmother now that she had passed away.

data.title: Meiwaku Danchi
data.synopsis: 6 children sit in front of the classroom and constantly gossip. When one of them is absent for three days due to a cold, the rest remain quiet as they don't want to leave the other child out from day-to-day gossip.

titles.title: Ima demo Senchou to Yobarete Iru Senchou no Yoru
今でも船長と呼ばれている船長の夜

data.title: Ima demo Senchou to Yobarete Iru Senchou no Yoru
data.title_japanese: 今でも船長と呼ばれている船長の夜
data.synopsis: A sea captain enjoys a nice night slumber at home. But he ponders about all the adventures he'd had before finally drifting off.

titles.title: 实验品家庭 -クリーチャーズ・ファミリー・デイズ-

data.title: Shiyan Pin Jiating
data.title_japanese: 实验品家庭 -クリーチャーズ・ファミリー・デイズ-
data.synopsis:
Tanis, a child genius, is the youngest son of two mad scientists. His family has spent their lives withdrawn from normal society living on an isolated island, where the couple conducts experiments on Tanis' siblings that result in them gaining abnormal abilities. However, this activity is put to a stop when they are caught and arrested.

Tanis is brought by government officials to a more populated island, alongside his four siblings: Snow, a dog-human hybrid; Ashise, a plant-human hybrid; Aisley, a spider-human hybrid; and Suishi, a mind-reader. Being the only one who has not been genetically modified, Tanis takes on the responsibility of adapting his siblings to society, all while trying to conceal their' distinctive characteristics.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Shiyan Pin Jiating, also know as The Frankenstein Family, is based on the ongoing manhua series (Chinese manga) of the same name, created by Yanai, a manhuajia from Hong Kong. The series is published by Sun Comics (Rigeng Jihua), who also collaborated with Tencent Penguin Pictures and Phoenix Animation (Dahuoniao Donghua) on the anime adaptation. In an added segment in the original manhua, creator Yanai states that the ideas for the characters originated from a group drawing project in middle school, which he then further refined. There is currently no North American company licensed to carry this production.

titles.title: Na mo Nai Hana no Youni

data.title: Na mo Nai Hana no Youni
data.synopsis: Various people take care of their pet dogs.

data.title: Yumehito: Yumejin
data.synopsis: A university student dreams of becoming a ballet dancer. She feels like she can't ever achieve it but goes through a period of self-reflection of what makes her happy.

data.title: Koinu no Plue
data.synopsis: A man plays with his puppy through the different seasons but the dog passes away. The man feels blue that he lost his best friend but doesn't regret the time he spent with it.

data.title: Kozou no Koushin
data.synopsis: A Japanese rendition of Henry Mancini's song Baby Elephant Walk which was originally created for the 1962 American film "Hatari!".

data.title: Chiisana Tegami
data.synopsis: Various people try to write a small letter to those significant in their lives.

data.title: Kawa wa Dare no Mono?
data.synopsis: A song about how the rain becomes rivers, how the rivers give life, and how the rivers become wide open seas.

data.title: Attakai, Fuyu Canada
data.synopsis: A Japanese tourism promotion anime inviting Japanese people to visit Canada. The anime is sponsored by the Canada Tourism Bureau (Canada Kankou Kyoku) which celebrates its 150th anniversary.

data.title: Kenja no Mago
data.synopsis:
In the kingdom of Earlshide, Merlin Wolford was once regarded as a national hero, hailed for both his power and achievements. Preferring a quiet life however, he secludes himself deep in the rural woods, dedicating his time to raising an orphan that he saved. This orphan is Shin, a normal salaryman in modern-day Japan who was reincarnated into Merlin's world while still retaining his past memories. As the years pass, Shin displays unparalleled talent in both magic casting and martial arts, much to Merlin's constant amazement.

On his 15th birthday, however, it becomes apparent that Shin only developed his combat skills and nothing else, leaving him with blatant social awkwardness, a lack of common sense, and a middling sense of responsibility. As a result, Shin enrolls in the kingdom's Magic Academy to hone his skills and mature among other teenagers. However, living a normal life is impossible, as he is established as a local celebrity almost as soon as he arrives.

As Shin Wolford adjusts to his high school life in the capital, he makes new friends, learns about the world, and fights off the various forces of evil surrounding him and his city.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Yodel no Onna
data.synopsis: The sound of yodeling will appear when you least expect it.
